stimulus:
Welcome to the experiment!

In this experiment, you will see a series of images.

Your task is to categorize each image into one of two categories (A and B) as quickly and accurately as possible.

You will receive feedback after each response. If you get the category wrong, you will be asked to choose the category again

Fluffy blesses you. Good job!
